name: Citrus & Fennel Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 small Purple Onion, Sliced into Rings
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the outer leaves from the fennel and reserve 1 tablespoon of the feathery leaves.
2. Cut the fennel bulb in half crosswise, then lengthwise into thin slices.
3. In a medium bowl, combine the fennel bulb, reserved leaves, grated orange rind, salt, pepper, crushed fennel seeds, orange juice, and olive oil. Toss gently.
4. Cover and chill.
5. Drain any excess liquid from the salad mixture.
6. Spoon the fennel mixture into the center of a round serving platter.
7. Arrange the oranges and grapefruit around the fennel mixture.
8. Top with sliced purple onion.
9. Place radicchio around the outside of the platter, tucking leaves under the orange and grapefruit slices.
10. Drizzle with the reserved orange juice mixture.
(Fat 2. Chol. O.)
